FLAC (Free Lossless Audio Codec) 1.2.1: Added MIME type.
ESRI Shapefile Projection (Well-Known Text) Format: Added small EOF offset to account for potential for line-endings. Submitted by Landesarchiv Nordrhein-Westfalen.
Stuffit X Archive File: Adjusted signature.
Thumbs DB file XP: Added MIME type.

The Neuroimaging Informatics Technology Initiative File Format 1: Added version number. Added missing extension and second signature variant. Added alias 'NIfTI-1 Data Format'. Added format type 'Dataset'. Additional information provided by Bodleian Libraries, University of Oxford.
3MF 3D Manufacturing Format: Changed MIME type from application/vnd.ms-package.3dmanufacturing-3dmodel+xml to application/vnd.ms-3mfdocument to match current IANA entry.

Corel Presentation 7-8-9: Adjusted container signature to resolve issue with non-ASCII character representation causing non-identification within Linux environments. Issue identified through Ross Spencer's Skeleton Corpus work and resolution assisted by State Records New South Wales and Richard Lehane's Siegfried file format identification tool.

Compound WordPerfect for Windows Document 6 onwards: Adjusted container signature to resolve issue with non-ASCII character representation causing non-identification within Linux environments. Issue identified through Ross Spencer's Skeleton Corpus work and resolution assisted by State Records New South Wales and Richard Lehane's Siegfried file format identification tool.
Windows Portable Executable 32 bit: Changed MIME type from application/octet-stream to application/vnd.microsoft.portable-executable to match current IANA entry.
Windows Portable Executable 64 bit: Changed MIME type from application/octet-stream to application/vnd.microsoft.portable-executable to match current IANA entry.
GZIP Format: Changed MIME type from application/x-gzip to application/gzip to match current IANA entry.
Windows Portable Executable: Changed MIME type from application/octet-stream to application/vnd.microsoft.portable-executable to match current IANA entry.
Windows Cabinet File: Added MIME type.
Java Compiled Object Code: Gave priority over Alias Pix Image File due to rare edge-case clash conditions.
